sentences.arabic: اشْتَكَتِ الْبِنْتُ لَمَى مِنْ أَلَمٍ فِي أُذُنِهَا.
sentences.translation: Djevojčica Lama se žalila na bol u uhu.
sentences.translationEn: The girl Lama complained of pain in her ear.

sentences.arabic: أَخَذَتْهَا أُمُّهَا إِلَى طَبِيبِ الْأَطْفَالِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Majka ju je odvela kod pedijatra ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: Her mother took her to the children's doctor in the morning.

sentences.arabic: فَحَصَ الطَّبِيبُ أُذُنَهَا وَكَتَبَ لَهَا دَوَاءً.
sentences.translation: Ljekar je pregledao njezino uho i napisao joj lijek.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor examined her ear and wrote her a prescription.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ يَوْمَيْنِ زَالَ الْأَلَمُ وَعَادَتْ لَمَى تَلْعَبُ بِسَعَادَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Nakon dva dana bol je prošla i Lama se radosno vratila igrati.
sentences.translationEn: After two days the pain was gone and Lama returned to playing happily.
